2024 update: the last version of the app is much better than early versions. One gripe is the limit to a measly 10MByte for graffiti image upload, which is small compared to the photos that most modern phones take by default. Reducing image size takes extra steps.

The 311 app and web version serve its purpose. Residents can report issues in a centralized database. The self service is fast and efficient. It can take some time to resolve more complex cases, but the biggest advantage is the data behind it to justify major improvement projects such as the LED streetlight replacement and the repavement project. One improvement suggestion is to make the app more interactive by allowing residents to work as a team to combat issues together.
